opportunities.title: EIC Accelerator 2026 — Open Call (Rolling)
opportunities.description: EIC Accelerator supports startups and SMEs developing breakthrough innovations at TRL 6–8. Rolling submissions evaluated monthly. Budget 2026: €414M (Open track) + €220M (Challenges). Slovak companies fully eligible.

opportunities.title: EIC Pathfinder Challenges 2026
opportunities.description: EIC Pathfinder Challenges funds visionary research on radical new technologies within defined thematic areas. Budget 2026: €96M. AI foundations, advanced security, and novel computing paradigms are eligible themes.

opportunities.title: Horizon Europe — Cybersecurity Cluster 3 Call 2026
opportunities.description: Cluster 3 'Civil Security for Society' covers cybersecurity research including AI-driven threat detection, secure digital infrastructure, and privacy-enhancing technologies. Consortium of 3+ EU entities required.

opportunities.title: NGI Taler — 14th Open Call (Privacy-Preserving Payments)
opportunities.description: NGI Taler 14th open call funds privacy-preserving digital payment solutions. Open to SMEs, academics, nonprofits, and individuals. Outcomes must be open source. Lightweight application, fast decision cycle.

opportunities.title: NGI Fediversity — 12th Open Call (Federated Hosting Stack)
opportunities.description: NGI Fediversity 12th call for 'creating the hosting stack of the future' — federated infrastructure, data sovereignty, and open digital services. Open to SMEs, academics, individuals. Open source required.

opportunities.title: Slovak Innovation & Digital Vouchers — SIEA 2026
opportunities.description: Innovation vouchers support Slovak businesses cooperating with R&D institutions on innovation, including AI and digital transformation. Digital vouchers cover digitalization of services. Rolling submission throughout 2026.

opportunities.title: Eurostars 2026/S2 — International R&D Collaboration
opportunities.description: Eurostars supports R&D-intensive SMEs in international collaborative projects. Slovakia is a member state. AI, security, and deep tech projects are consistently funded. Requires min. 2 partners from different EUREKA countries.

opportunities.title: EUREKA GlobalStars — International Bilateral Calls
opportunities.description: EUREKA GlobalStars provides R&D funding for collaborative projects between European and non-European partners (USA, Canada, South Korea, etc.). Good fit for Velgard if targeting global market entry.
